web.markdown:
## Navigation menu ### Namespaces English ### Views More Search [Visit the main page](https://arknights.wiki.gg/ "Visit the main page") ### Navigation ### Arknights ### Game modes ### Miscellaneous ### Guides ### Lore ### Real-world ### Community ### Tools \[dismiss\] The _Arknights Terra Wiki_ is a collaborative, community-maintained wiki. If you notice an issue, please consider making an edit, starting a discussion on the article's talk page, or reaching out via the [Arknights Terra Wiki Discord](https://discord.gg/2eXU4KHYpB). # Outfit From Arknights Terra Wiki [Jump to navigation](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Outfit#mw-head) [Jump to search](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Outfit#searchInput) Most [Operators](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Operator "Operator") in _[Arknights](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Arknights "Arknights")_ have various **outfits**, changing their appearance and art in accordance to various themes. Every alternate outfit is designed and produced by various [Terran](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Terra "Terra") fashion brands covering a wide range of genres including, but not limited to, combat wear, casual outfits, designer clothes, street wear, beach wear, and more. Many outfits also have special effects during gameplay, including new VFX and SFX along with reskins of summons, if applicable. All outfits are purely cosmetic and provide no substantial gameplay benefit. Most outfits are available in the [Outfit Store](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Outfit_Store "Outfit Store"), bought with [![Originite Prime](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Originite_Prime.png/22px-Originite_Prime.png?b25e7e)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Originite_Prime)[Originite Prime](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Originite_Prime) or acquired by using [![Outfit Voucher](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Outfit_Voucher.png/21px-Outfit_Voucher.png?db89de)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Outfit_Voucher)[Outfit Voucher](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Outfit_Voucher) (although certain limitations apply), and some are obtained from various [events](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Event "Event"). It is _highly_ recommended for players to save up their Originite Primes whenever possible to buy outfits for their favorite Operators to make the most of them. ## Contents - [1Brands](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Outfit#Brands) - [2Unique](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Outfit#Unique) - [2.1Dynamic art](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Outfit#Dynamic_art) - [2.2Special](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Outfit#Special) - [2.3Alternate art](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Outfit#Alternate_art) - [3Trivia](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Outfit#Trivia) - [4Note](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Outfit#Note) - [5Navigation](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Outfit#Navigation) ## Brands\[ [edit](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Outfit?action=edit§ion=1 "Edit section: Brands")\] Attention! The descriptions of each brand are unofficial and intended to provide readers with a quick introduction regarding the brand's theme and inspirations. | | | | --- | --- | | [![Test Collection.png](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Test_Collection.png/128px-Test_Collection.png?bdceb7)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Outfit/Test_Collection "Outfit/Test Collection") | **[Test Collection](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Outfit/Test_Collection "Outfit/Test Collection")**
Tailor made to order. Test Collection delivers on their motto, "Always Unique", by delivering one-of-a-kind outfits designed exactly to the customer's specifications. | | [![EPOQUE.png](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/EPOQUE.png/128px-EPOQUE.png?368ce0)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Outfit/EPOQUE "Outfit/EPOQUE") | **[EPOQUE](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Outfit/EPOQUE "Outfit/EPOQUE")**
From school uniforms to battlesuits, designer clothes to casual wear—EPOQUE provides a wide range of outfits from all manner of eccentric designers who work not for profit, but passion, often incorporating the customer's unique traits to the final brand. | | [![Made by 0011.png](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Made_by_0011.png/128px-Made_by_0011.png?d68107)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Outfit/Made_by_0011 "Outfit/Made by 0011") | **[Made by 0011](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Outfit/Made_by_0011 "Outfit/Made by 0011")**
Produced by [Lungmen](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Lungmen "Lungmen") artisans, 0011 crafts festive and traditional outfits since Terran year 0011 to celebrate [Yan](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Yan "Yan")'s victory over the [Nian](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Nian "Nian") beast. | | [![0011 Tempest.png](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/0011_Tempest.png/128px-0011_Tempest.png?2e6342)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Outfit/0011_Tempest "Outfit/0011 Tempest") | **[0011/Tempest](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Outfit/0011_Tempest "Outfit/0011 Tempest")**
0011/Tempest, a sub-brand of 0011, focuses on current trends and casual yet stylish street wear. | | [![0011 Yun.png](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/0011_Yun.png/96px-0011_Yun.png?a61aa5)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Outfit/0011_Yun "Outfit/0011 Yun") | **[0011/Yun](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Outfit/0011_Yun "Outfit/0011 Yun")**
0011's Yun brand consists of traditional Yanese attire, reimagined with a modern twist. | | [![MARTHE.png](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/MARTHE.png/128px-MARTHE.png?53c8bf)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Outfit/MARTHE "Outfit/MARTHE") | **[MARTHE](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Outfit/MARTHE "Outfit/MARTHE")**
From the hands of [Crownie Mantel](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Crownie_Mantel "Crownie Mantel"), MARTHE is a well-renowned sportswear brand with multiple sub-brands dedicated to unique requests from its customers. | | [![Coral Coast.png](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Coral_Coast.png/128px-Coral_Coast.png?e0d423)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Outfit/Coral_Coast "Outfit/Coral Coast") | **[Coral Coast](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Outfit/Coral_Coast "Outfit/Coral Coast")**
One of MARTHE's many sub-brands, Coral Coast is dedicated to summer attire and aquatic sports. | | [![Witch Feast.png](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Witch_Feast.png/128px-Witch_Feast.png?ce41e7)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Outfit/Witch_Feast "Outfit/Witch Feast") | **[Witch Feast](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Outfit/Witch_Feast "Outfit/Witch Feast")**
A [Rhodes Island](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Rhodes_Island "Rhodes Island") brand, Witch Feast brings an originally [Sarkaz](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Sarkaz "Sarkaz")-only tradition to the spotlight for all Terrans to enjoy with custom-made outfits. | | [![Cambrian Series.png](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Cambrian_Series.png/128px-Cambrian_Series.png?4334da)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Outfit/Cambrian_Series "Outfit/Cambrian Series") | **[Cambrian Series](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Outfit/Cambrian_Series "Outfit/Cambrian Series")**
Cambrian, one of the original brands dedicated to [Catastrophe Messengers](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Catastrophe_Messenger "Catastrophe Messenger"), is famous for their climate-resistant outfits. Despite expanding their brand with new concepts, they continue to incorporate the durability and comfort they are well-regarded for. | | [![Icefield Messenger.png](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Icefield_Messenger.png/128px-Icefield_Messenger.png?809437)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Outfit/Icefield_Messenger "Outfit/Icefield Messenger") | **[Icefield Messenger](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Outfit/Icefield_Messenger "Outfit/Icefield Messenger")**
A special brand dedicated to celebrating the legend of a Messenger dressed in red, delivering life-saving supplies through the snow and asking for nothing in return. Icefield Messenger focuses on comfortable and stylish winter clothing. | | [![Vitafield.png](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Vitafield.png/128px-Vitafield.png?ff8bc5)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Outfit/Vitafield "Outfit/Vitafield") | **[Vitafield](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Outfit/Vitafield "Outfit/Vitafield")**
Vitafield produces durable and lightweight outdoor attire, suitable for exploration and adventure. The brand gained great popularity amongst the public soon after establishment. | | [![Pioneer.png](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Pioneer.png/128px-Pioneer.png?8916ed)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Outfit/Pioneer "Outfit/Pioneer") | **[Raythean Pioneer](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Outfit/Pioneer "Outfit/Pioneer")**
A subdivision of [Raythean Industries](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Raythean_Industries "Raythean Industries"), the Pioneer brand provides professionals in high-risk occupations and extreme environments with reliable and maintainable outfits. | | [![Striker.png](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Striker.png/128px-Striker.png?896adc)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Outfit/Striker "Outfit/Striker") | **[Striker](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Outfit/Striker "Outfit/Striker")**
Raythean Industries's Striker brand sells combat gear for professionals, providing custom gear tailored to the customer's [Arts](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Arts "Arts") and needs. [![Moonlit Voyage](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Kroos_Skin_2_icon.png/60px-Kroos_Skin_2_icon.png?88ee29)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Kroos/Gallery#Moonlit_Voyage)
[![The Legend Seeker](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Exusiai_the_New_Covenant_Skin_1_icon.png/60px-Exusiai_the_New_Covenant_Skin_1_icon.png?1614f3)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Exusiai_the_New_Covenant/Gallery#The_Legend_Seeker)
[![The Remains of Time](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Kal%27tsit_Skin_2_icon.png/60px-Kal%27tsit_Skin_2_icon.png?2c9087)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Kal%27tsit/Gallery#The_Remains_of_Time) | ## Trivia\[ [edit](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Outfit?action=edit§ion=6 "Edit section: Trivia")\] ![](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/SNS_sticker_63.png/75px-SNS_sticker_63.png?70fd87) Notice The following content may be out of date, subjective, or incomplete. Please consider contributing to help maintain accurate and up to date information on the wiki. - With six outfits as of December 23, 2025, [Amiya](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Amiya "Amiya") has the most outfits of all Operators. This distinction remains true despite [_Touch the Stars_](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Amiya/Guard/Gallery#Touch_the_Stars) being exclusive to the CN server, which reduces the count to five in the Global and TW servers. - Amiya is also the only non- [6★](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/6-star "6-star") Operator with two dynamic art outfits. - Out of [Suzuran](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Suzuran "Suzuran")'s three outfits, two of them coincide with collaboration events ([_Spring Praise_](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Suzuran/Gallery#Spring_Praise) with [It's Been A While](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/It%27s_Been_A_While "It's Been A While"); [_Yukibare_](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Suzuran/Gallery#Yukibare) with [A Flurry to the Flame](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/A_Flurry_to_the_Flame "A Flurry to the Flame")). - Prior to the release of [Lee](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Lee "Lee")'s [_The Life Appraiser_](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Lee/Gallery#The_Life_Appraiser), SilverAsh was the only male Operator with three outfits, with his [_Never-melting Ice_](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/SilverAsh/Gallery#Never-melting_Ice) also being the first Ambience Synesthesia outfit with dynamic art. - Out of 6★ Operators introduced with the release of _Arknights_, [Eyjafjalla](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Eyjafjalla "Eyjafjalla") is the one with the longest period of time without outfit, at two years, and the last one to receive an outfit. This becomes a meme in the Global community of _Arknights_ which extends to other 6★ Operators who did not yet receive an outfit. - After Eyjafjalla, [Saga](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Saga "Saga") becomes the Operator with the longest time without an outfit, which became a meme in CN community and even caused a small protest in [A Flurry to the Flame](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/A_Flurry_to_the_Flame "A Flurry to the Flame"). Saga did receive [_There They Be_](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Saga/Gallery#There_They_Be) in [Hortus de Escapismo](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Hortus_de_Escapismo "Hortus de Escapismo") along with [Fartooth](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Fartooth "Fartooth") also receiving her first outfit ([_Hear the Wind Sing_](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Fartooth/Gallery#Hear_the_Wind_Sing)) since her release in the [Pinus Sylvestris event](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Pinus_Sylvestris_(event) "Pinus Sylvestris (event)"). - [Free Operators](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Free_Operator "Free Operator") often receive their outfits at their event reruns. There are also some reruns which does not include new outfits such as [Dossoles Holiday](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Dossoles_Holiday/Rerun "Dossoles Holiday/Rerun") and in certain cases such as [Stultifera Navis](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Stultifera_Navis/Rerun "Stultifera Navis/Rerun") where [Skadi](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Skadi "Skadi") received the outfit meant for [Lumen](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Lumen "Lumen"), who received his outfit as part of [Ambience Synesthesia 2023](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Ambience_Synesthesia/2023 "Ambience Synesthesia/2023") already. ## Note\[ [edit](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Outfit?action=edit§ion=7 "Edit section: Note")\] 1. [↑](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Outfit#cite_ref-1 "Jump up")This is a misunderstanding in fact because Live2D is widely used in games for the dynamic art and interact animations. The dynamic art in _[Arknights](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Arknights "Arknights")_ is in fact powered by Spine animation engine, which is also used for the [Operators](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Operator "Operator") _chibi_ in-game models. ## Navigation Expand[View or edit this template](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Template:Features "Template:Features") _Arknights_ features Gameplay -
